## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm exec oxfmt --check .` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] E2E (`pnpm test:e2e`) passes where affected
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits; PR title too
- [ ] New dependencies are exactly pinned (no `^`/`~`/`latest`)
- [ ] D1 migrations (if any) are backward-compatible (expand-contract)
